segments.text: The only way to go viral is to create bad content. I think that most people think they need to have it all figured out and then start posting online. The
truth is often times that you start posting online and then you figure it out. It's from the doing that you get the clarity. You need to be confident
enough to go and just look cringe for a bit. You need to be confident enough to go and just start putting, [music] you know, your first pieces of content out
there and start developing what I call the shipping muscle. When you ship things, you build leverage. When you ship them, you start building your movement.
